calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar May-11-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098.

Joseph K. Bravo, Esq. appeared with plaintiffs and cross-defendants David Banyard and Michelle Baker, who were placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendants and cross-complainants Brigida Custodia or Pierre Andrade.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on May 14, 2008.
Trial date has been continued from September 29, 2008 to November 3, 2008 to May 4, 2009 to today, May 11, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, May 11, 2009.
By Order of the Court, Cross-complaint filed by cross-complainants Brigida Custodia and Pierre Andrade shall be dismissed today, May 11, 2009.
Plaintiffs' Trial Brief was filed today, May 11, 2009.

Plaintiff introduces the following documentary evidence:

Exhibit 1---Residential Lease Agreement, dated 8/1/03--------------------------------ID/EVID.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiffs David Banyard and Michelle Baker, and against defendants Brigida Custodia and Pierre Andrade as follows:

As to Plaintiff David Banyard:
Damages/Principal - $40,000.00.
Attorney's Fees - To Be Determined.
Costs - To Be Determined.

As to Plaintiff Michelle Baker:
Damages/Principal - $25,000.
Attorney's Fees - To Be Determined.
Costs - To Be Determined.

Counsel for plaintiff shall submit a proposed judgment to the Court no later than May 15, 2009.
